retrieval.query_summary: Analyze Volatility 100 Index for a pro-trend reversal setup at a HTF POI after a pullback.

factors.name: Macro bias alignment
factors.notes: No conflicting macro data provided; treated as aligned.

factors.name: HTF structure aligned
factors.notes: Trade direction is LONG, aligning with the D1/W1 bullish trend. This is a pro-trend entry.

factors.name: MTF/LTF BOS or ChoCH confirmed
factors.notes: M1 has a confirmed bullish CHoCH at 716.7, providing LTF entry confirmation.

factors.name: Valid Structural Entry Support
factors.notes: Entry is inside a high-quality, unmitigated D1 Bullish Order Block [661.66, 715.39]. Exceptional quality warrants a score of 2.

factors.name: Liquidity sweep into entry zone
factors.notes: The selected M1 candidate (ID ...5b968559) confirms an SSL sweep occurred just before the bullish structural shift.

factors.name: COT alignment
factors.notes: No COT data available; treated as aligned.

factors.name: Wyckoff phase supports direction
factors.notes: The sweep below recent lows into the D1 demand zone, followed by a sharp reversal, is characteristic of a Wyckoff Spring.

factors.name: No high-impact news within 30 minutes
factors.notes: No high-impact news events were provided in the data.

factors.name: Minimum R:R achievable
factors.notes: The potential R:R to TP3 is approximately 34:1, far exceeding the 1:3 minimum for Intraday style.

cot_signal.summary: No COT data available for this instrument.

evidence.content_preview: Every entry must be inside or at a valid 4H or higher Supply/Demand zone or Order Block.

raw_response.explainable_reasoning: The overall market structure is strongly bullish on the HTF (W1/D1). A counter-trend bearish pullback on the MTF (H4/H1) has driven price into a key unmitigated D1 Bullish Order Block between 661.66 and 715.39. The most recent price action shows a high-confidence reversal pattern at this HTF POI. Specifically, the M1 timeframe has printed a bullish Change of Character (CHoCH) at 716.7, followed by a Break of Market Structure (BMS). The selected entry is based on a high-confluence M1 candidate (ID: ...5b968559, Confluence: 10/10) which is a HTF_CHOCH+LTF_BMS+SSL_SWEEP+RTO pattern. This indicates that the LTF is now aligning with the dominant HTF bullish trend. The entry is taken from the M1 Order Block [711.34, 713.87] created during this reversal. Since the LTF confirmation has already occurred within the HTF POI, an instant execution is warranted. The setup has an exceptional R:R ratio targeting the liquidity resting above the MTF pullback swing highs.

htf_bias.notes: W1 and D1 timeframes are strongly bullish, with a confirmed bullish BMS on D1 at 775.47. Price is currently mitigating a major unmitigated D1 Bullish Order Block at [661.66, 715.39].

mtf_bias.notes: H6 down to H1 exhibited a clear bearish pullback structure, driving price into the HTF D1 demand zone. The most recent price action on M1 shows a bullish Change of Character (CHoCH) at 716.7, signaling a potential reversal to align with the HTF bullish trend.

evidence.content_preview: SL must be structural — placed beyond the invalidation level of the setup (beyond OB, beyond QML, beyond swing high/low)

stop_loss.reason: Placed below the M1 bullish Order Block and the structural low that preceded the bullish CHoCH.

take_profits.basis: Targets the M15 swing high and recent structural break level.
Targets the H1 swing high, a key liquidity pool from the bearish pullback.
Targets a more significant H1 swing high, representing a major draw on liquidity.

evidence.content_preview: Wyckoff Theory | Phase identification, composite operator logic | 1W / 1D — directional context only
